why: Ensure all required fields present with correct types

output.console: Schema validation result with field-level pass/fail details

success_handling.criteria: All frontmatter fields pass Zod schema validation with correct types and required fields present

event.message: Frontmatter schema validation passed for entry {entry_id}

error_handling.criteria: One or more frontmatter fields fail Zod schema validation (missing, wrong type, invalid value)
error_handling.action: Record validation errors as audit findings, continue audit to collect all issues

event.message: Frontmatter schema validation failed for entry {entry_id}: {validation_errors}

decisions.outcome: Record findings, proceed to validate-content-quality step to collect all audit issues
